query:
UPDATE invoices
            SET landlord_charge = $2::TEXT::NUMERIC,
                tenant_refund = $3::TEXT::NUMERIC,
                status = CASE
                    WHEN $2::TEXT::NUMERIC = 0 THEN 'refunded'
                    ELSE 'released'
                END
            WHERE onchain_invoice_id = $1::TEXT::NUMERIC
              AND kind = 'security_deposit'
              AND status = 'paid'
